list.name: Changes
list.comment: replace test fixture component beans with test configurations

MESSAGE.value: separate upload persistence and upload service into 2 modules
refractor gradle files in the upload-persistence and the upload modules by adding a convention test-fixtures-conventions.gradle.kts
rename the uploads module to uploads-service
rename the media directory to uploads
update upload-service to use the new transformation repository
Fix the cockroach test container shutdown issue.
Update CockroachContainer to a newer version because deprecation warning.
add the tests of the status update to the integration tests to UploadRepositoryIT
check foreign key name on error in UploadService
check foreign key name on error in UploadRepository
fix database schema in the uploads table
replace test fixture component beans with test configurations

option.name: LAST_COMMIT_MESSAGE
option.value: replace test fixture component beans with test configurations
